commands_run: bash -lc 'set -e; retry_remote() { local attempt=1; local max_attempts=1; while :; do if "$@"; then return 0; else rc=$?; fi; if [ "$attempt" -ge "$max_attempts" ]; then return "$rc"; fi; attempt=$((attempt + 1)); done; }; set +e; retry_remote bash -c "exit 7"; observed=$?; set -e; test "$observed" -eq 7'

bash -lc 'set -e; retry_remote() { local attempt=1; local max_attempts=1; while :; do if "$@"; then return 0; else rc=$?; fi; if [ "$attempt" -ge "$max_attempts" ]; then return "$rc"; fi; attempt=$((attempt + 1)); done; }; retry_remote bash -c "exit 0"'
failure_reason: Fixed Hostinger deploy retry_remote status capture by reading the tested command status inside the else branch. The shell reproduction preserves a failing status of 7 and accepts status 0, preventing the rc=0 false-failure loop seen in the PR #2381 deploy.
